chapter_title.en: Chapter 179 – The Masturbation and copulating with the animals

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/385)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/385)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مَلْعُونٌ مَنْ نَكَحَ بَهِيمَةً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad Al Kulayni, from Salih Bin Abu Hammad, from Muhammad Bin Ibrahim Al Nowfaly, from Al Husayn Bin Al Mukhtar, from one of his companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Accursed is the one who copulates with an animal’.
en.sarwar: 4. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ali ibn al-Rayyan who has said the following: “A man once wrote to abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and asked about a man who is with a woman and touches her from behind her clothes and his clothes and moves until he discharges semen; if it is like masturbation. He (the Imam) signed the answer that said, ‘In it he has reached his goal (of a sinful act).”’
